data.title: TENA partners with Brent Celek to promote men's bladder health this Valentine's Day, Feb. 13, 2026. #TENA #Celek #health
data.description: On February 13, 2026, in Philadelphia, a leading global incontinence products brand TENA is promoting a unique Valentine's Day gesture for Americans: backing the well-being and self-assurance of the men they care about. Collaborating with a former tight end from the Philadelphia Eagles, TENA aims to spread awareness and support for men's health.

data.title: GAC showcased 3 star models at Automorrow 2026 in Egypt, tapping into North Africa's potential market.
data.description: On February 13, 2026, the Automorrow 2026-Egypt International Motor Show commenced at the Cairo International Convention and Exhibition Center. The theme for this year's event is "DRIVING INNOVATION FORWARD." GAC showcased three of their top models at the show, including the EMZOOM.

data.title: Lei Zhang of Envision is first private-sector leader to win the Energy Institute President's Award in 2026.
data.description: In London on February 13, 2026, Lei Zhang, the Founder and CEO of Envision, was honored with the Energy Institute's prestigious 2026 President's Award. The Institute recognized Zhang for his outstanding contributions to the energy sector and the global impact of Envision. This award symbolizes the organization's acknowledgment of Envision's significant role in transforming the energy industry.

data.title: Walnut Coding is expanding AI education in Chinese schools with public welfare courses. #AI #Education #China
data.description: In Beijing on February 13, 2026, Walnut Coding, a prominent online coding platform for young students, is spearheading the integration of artificial intelligence (AI) education in primary and secondary schools throughout China. The Company aims to enhance the learning experience by incorporating AI technology into educational curriculums. With a focus on cultivating the next generation of tech-savvy individuals, Walnut Coding's efforts are expected to impact a significant number of schools and students nationwide.

data.title: PU Prime receives CMA licence in UAE, expanding its global presence. License number No. 20200000388 issued.
data.description: In Dubai, the United Arab Emirates, on February 13, 2026, PU Prime, a prominent international multi-asset broker group, revealed that its branch in Dubai has successfully obtained a license from the Capital Market Authority (CMA) of the UAE. The specific license number provided is 20200000388.

data.title: Consensus Hong Kong 2026 saw 11,000 attendees from 122 countries, fostering global discussions on finance and digital assets.
data.description: In Hong Kong on February 13, 2026, Consensus Hong Kong 2026 concluded its second edition after running from February 10 to 12 at the Hong Kong Convention and Exhibition Centre. The event featured three days of impactful programming that drew 11,000 registered attendees from more than 122 countries.

data.title: World-first EXO 001 exosome platform for multi-target CAR-T in solid tumors developed, showing promising preclinical results. Cancer is a leading cause of death in Taiwan.
data.description: A collaborative effort between China Medical University Hospital and Ever Supreme Bio Technology has resulted in the development of a platform showcasing impressive preclinical tumor clearance in various models. As of February 13, 2026, in Taichung, it is noteworthy that cancer has consistently been a prominent cause of mortality in Taiwan. This innovative platform has demonstrated promising results in tackling this health concern, highlighting the advancements made in addressing cancer-related challenges.

data.title: Save on 5-star Singapore spring break at Grand Park City Hall; offers exclusive deals on family suites; ideal for March school holiday & Easter getaway.
data.description: In Singapore, as of February 13, 2026, travelers looking to visit during the March school holiday, Easter, or spring break seasons can take advantage of exclusive discounts at Grand Park City Hall. This luxurious five-star hotel, situated in a prime location in the city center, offers spacious accommodations.

data.title: ExSat partners with Fosun Wealth Holdings for global quantitative trading contest. 2026 Asia Crypto Finance Forum held in Hong Kong, Feb 10.
data.description: On February 10, 2026, in Hong Kong, the "2026 Asia Crypto Finance High-Level Closed-Door Forum" took place, co-hosted by prominent Web3 institutions. This event highlighted the growth patterns of crypto finance in Asia.

data.title: Dentsu appoints Takeshi Sano as President and Global CEO, unveiling new global management structure.
data.description: Dentsu has revealed its updated global management setup, with Takeshi Sano taking on the roles of President and Global CEO at the company. This change marks a key milestone for dentsu as it navigates its strategic direction, overseeing operations across various regions. Sano's appointment signifies a significant development within the organization and brings about a shift in leadership focus. The announcement comes amidst a period of transition for dentsu as it aims to reinforce its position in the market and capitalize on emerging opportunities.
SPOT SILVER RISES 5% TO $78.87/OZ

data.title: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong hints at launching own prediction market as company expands beyond retail distribution.
data.description: During the fourth quarter of 2025, Coinbase Global Inc. CEO Brian Armstrong revealed that the company, trading under NASDAQ as COIN, is considering launching its own prediction market business, moving beyond its current role as a retail distributor for platforms such as Kalshi. Armstrong emphasized that the partnership with Kalshi is not exclusive and stated that Coinbase has the capacity to establish its own markets. This announcement came during the company's earnings call, where Armstrong mentioned that while there are no concrete plans at the moment, all possibilities are being explored. In related news, Coinbase recently expanded its prediction market service to operate in all 50 states just before Super Bowl LX, indicating the company's growing involvement in this sector.

data.title: Nasdaq falls 2% due to tech selloff, Fear & Greed Index moves to 'Fear'. Cisco shares drop 12%, AppLovin falls 20%. AEP gains 3%.
data.description: The CNN Money Fear and Greed index indicated a decrease in market sentiment, moving into the "Fear" zone on Thursday. U.S. stocks experienced a decline, with the Nasdaq Composite dropping by 2% in the session. Despite surpassing earnings and revenue predictions, Cisco (NASDAQ: CSCO) saw a more than 12% decrease in shares as investors focused on weaker forward guidance. AppLovin Corp. (NASDAQ: APP) also plummeted by 20% despite beating estimates, due to disappointing guidance overshadowing positive results. Conversely, American Electric Power Company, Inc. (NASDAQ: AEP) observed a more than 3% increase in shares after reporting strong fourth-quarter results. Additionally, on the economic data front, U.S. initial jobless claims showed...Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Bioretec Ltd's financials for Jan-Dec 2025: Net sales EUR 3,522k (-22.5% vs 2024), EBITDA EUR -8,476k. Strategy update for 2026–2028.
data.description: Bioretec Ltd posted its financial statements for January to December 2025, revealing a decrease in net sales to EUR 3,522 thousand compared to the previous year's EUR 4,544 thousand. Sales margin also decreased to EUR 2,314 thousand, and EBITDA was EUR -8,476 thousand. The company's result for the period amounted to EUR -9,483 thousand. The Board of Directors proposed no dividend be distributed for the financial period. Despite an increase in R&D expenditure, the equity ratio stood above 84%. Cash and cash equivalents dropped to EUR 4,126 thousand, and earnings per share were negative. The number of undiluted shares increased to 30,788,092. Further details are available at the company's website.
